TEXT.BibTeX_citation: @misc{Wiki_tay_Cory_Alexander, title = Cory_Alexander, year = 2025, month = May, day = 5, note = {In Wikipedia [Atayal]}, url = {https://tay.wikipedia.org/wiki/Cory_Alexander} }

S.FORM: == Cory Alexander == Cory Alexander sraral hya'ga sisyuw na NBA, wal malaxmisuq qaniy la. kawas te 1973, byacing te 6 ru 22 ryax qu hintgan nya, kinhulan nya ga Virginia, hiya ga mnanak na ppzuy mari waya, ru squliq ka ppkal mari waya. 185 kunbun kinwagiq nya, 84 kunkin kin'suw nya, hiya ga qutux nqu spzyang blaq na ppzuy mari NBA. kawas 1995 mnwayaw ppzuy mari ga, mzyup squ te qutux lahuy ru te magal squliq, galun nqu San Antonio Spurs. Cory Alexande syobay mzyu mari pqwasan biru maki Richmond,Virginia . kinblayqan pincyuwagan sa qnxan niya' pspngan mari sa may yugal yacing masuq mspung mari sa pspngan mari na maycyugal byacing lga cinkhulan sa knita' sa brbiru' Lists of National Basketball Association players

== Cory Alexander == Cory Alexander sraral hya'ga sisyuw na NBA, wal malaxmisuq qaniy la. kawas te 1973, byacing te 6 ru 22 ryax qu hintgan nya, kinhulan nya ga Virginia, hiya ga mnanak na ppzuy mari waya, ru squliq ka ppkal mari waya. 185 kunbun kinwagiq nya, 84 kunkin kin'suw nya, hiya ga qutux nqu spzyang blaq na ppzuy mari NBA. kawas 1995 mnwayaw ppzuy mari ga, mzyup squ te qutux lahuy ru te magal squliq, galun nqu San Antonio Spurs. Cory Alexande syobay mzyu mari pqwasan biru maki Richmond,Virginia . kinblayqan pincyuwagan sa qnxan niya' pspngan mari sa may yugal yacing masuq mspung mari sa pspngan mari na maycyugal byacing lga cinkhulan sa knita' sa brbiru' Lists of National Basketball Association players
S.PHON: == ʦ~ʨorj alexan*er == ʦ~ʨorj alexan*er s~ɕraral ħjaʔɣa s~ɕis~ɕjuw na nβa, wal malaxmis~ɕuq qanij la. kawas~ɕ te ****, βjaʦ~ʨiŋ te * ru ** rjax qu ħintɣan nja, kinħulan nja ɣa *irɣinia, ħija ɣa mnanak na ppzuj mari waja, ru s~ɕquliq ka ppkal mari waja. *** kunβun kinwaɣiq nja, ** kunkin kinʔs~ɕuw nja, ħija ɣa qutux nqu s~ɕpzjaŋ βlaq na ppzuj mari nβa. kawas~ɕ **** mnwajaw ppzuj mari ɣa, mzjup s~ɕqu te qutux laħuj ru te maɣal s~ɕquliq, ɣalun nqu s~ɕan antonio s~ɕpurs~ɕ. ʦ~ʨorj alexan*e s~ɕjoβaj mzju mari pqwas~ɕan βiru maki riʦ~ʨħmon*,*irɣinia . kinβlajqan pinʦ~ʨjuwaɣan s~ɕa qnxan nijaʔ ps~ɕpŋan mari s~ɕa maj juɣal jaʦ~ʨiŋ mas~ɕuq ms~ɕpuŋ mari s~ɕa ps~ɕpŋan mari na majʦ~ʨjuɣal βjaʦ~ʨiŋ lɣa ʦ~ʨinkħulan s~ɕa knitaʔ s~ɕa βrβiruʔ lis~ɕts~ɕ o* national βas~ɕketβall as~ɕs~ɕoʦ~ʨiation plajers~ɕ
